home.shortenShare: Everything you need for your links: Connect. Organize. Shorten. Share.
home.subtitle: Create your customized link-in-bio page and manage all your links in one single place.
home.featDesc1: Create highly customizable link-in-bio pages with modern themes, elegant fonts, and vector social icons.
home.featDesc2: Track page views, link clicks, and referrers clearly from your personal dashboard.
home.featDesc3: Customize link aliases and choose between direct redirects or ad-monetized loading pages.
home.themeSub: Our premium themes adapt to your brand's identity instantly.
home.faqA1: Free users display a 5-second countdown ad page before redirecting visitors. Paid users have the option to disable ads for direct redirects.
home.faqA2: It's a single landing page where you collect all your social networks, websites, products, and important links. Perfect for your Instagram or TikTok bio.
home.faqA3: On the free plan, links expire after 6 months. On paid plans (Pro & Premium), your links last forever.
home.faqQ4: Can I customize my link alias?
home.faqA4: Yes, Premium plan subscribers can define custom aliases, for example: wnut.me/my-brand.
